title: Malty Glassy-Jelly Argentinian Beans Casserole
description: A rich, slow-cooked casserole featuring baked beans and a sweet, malty glaze. This diabetic-friendly dish showcases the flavors of Argentina.

ingredients.name: Baked beans (low-sugar)
ingredients.notes: Drained and rinsed to reduce sugar content

ingredients.name: Malty syrup
ingredients.notes: Dark corn syrup with a hint of molasses

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Low-carb sugar substitute for added sweetness

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For saut4ing the onions and garlic

instructions: Sear the onions and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
Add the cumin and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the baked beans, malty syrup, brown sugar, and cocoa powder. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the mixture to a copper pot or a similar heat-retaining vessel.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until the glaze is thick and syrupy, and the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
Let the casserole rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to settle.
